L

load(Path) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.persistence.GameSaver
Deserializes and loads a previously saved game match state from a file.
loadLatestSave() - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameSession
Attempts to deserialize and load the latest save file from disk.
